name: external fhir validation integration
summary: Adds a repo-owned external FHIR bundle validation tool and verification requirements so emitted bundles can be checked through a formal model validator as part of the workflow.
user_visible_flows: operator validates emitted fhir bundle files with a repo-owned validation command
system_flows: generated bundle json is parsed through an external FHIR model validator
verification workflow now includes explicit external fhir validation when relevant
notes: The verification for this slice should validate bundles emitted from more than one fixture, not just the original sample.
